title: Rick Tew's NinjaGym
shortDesc: Obstacle courses, ninja training and martial arts for ages 3-10. Group sessions with staff supervision. Drop-off approved.
description: Rick Tew's NinjaGym is Koh Samui's premier kids action sports facility offering guided obstacle courses, martial arts and ninja warrior-style training. With padded floors, foam pits, balance beams and wall runs, children ages 3-10 channel their inner ninja while building strength, coordination and confidence. Group sessions are run by qualified instructors so parents can enjoy a well-earned break. SamuiKids.com members receive an exclusive discount.
